scripts.ai:start: set APP_ENV=production&& set PYTHONUTF8=1&& set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& ..\..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe ..\ai-service\app.py
scripts.backend:start:with-ai: wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/health && set AI_SERVICE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000&& npm run start:raw
scripts.start:core: kill-port 5000 8000 && concurrently --restart-tries 10 --restart-after 2000 -n AI,BACKEND -c cyan,green "npm run ai:start" "npm run backend:start:with-ai"
